title: Night Light, LED Touch Bedside Table Lamp, Cordless Rechargeable USB Table Lamp, 3-Level Dimmable Brightness, IP54 Waterproof, Full Metal Housing, Dual Battery Power, Black
features: Metal Table Lamp: High-quality full-metal body with a round cylinder lampshade. Durable, stable, and slip-resistant thanks to anti-slip pads on the base
48 LEDs & 3 Brightness Levels: A total of 48 LEDs (20 inner, 28 outer) provide uniform lighting. Three brightness levels meet various lighting needs
Dual Battery & Long Runtime: Dual-battery design for extended use: Level 1 (16h), Level 2 (9h), Level 3 (7h). Ideal for indoor and outdoor use without frequent recharging
Versatile Use: Cordless operation suitable for office, bedroom, living room, café, garden, or patio. Creates a cozy and relaxing atmosphere anywhere
Usage Note: Please fully charge before first use. Avoid using fast chargers to maintain long-term battery life
